message:
chore(beads): file flywheel_connectors-23v0o audit bead for untested symlinked preopen escape

Pure insertion into .beads/issues.jsonl (1 line added, 0 removed). No
modifications to existing bead records.

New issue: `flywheel_connectors-23v0o — [AUDIT] fcp-conformance
symlinked preopen escape is untested`. Notes that
crates/fcp-conformance/tests/sandbox_isolation_conformance.rs:150-196
currently exercises only direct path escape cases and does not cover
the symlink-via-preopen escape vector. Filed as an audit follow-up so
the gap has a tracked owner.

files.patch:
@@ -485,6 +485,7 @@
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.8","title":"[ASUPERSYNC] Migrate fcp-host Orchestrator Runtime + Process Supervision","description":"# Goal
Port `fcp-host` runtime entrypoint, orchestration loops, and process/task supervision from Tokio to asupersync-first execution.

## Scope
- Host startup/shutdown lifecycle, background workers, request fanout, control-plane async paths.
- Replace Tokio-specific sync/time/process usage with substrate-approved primitives.

## Rationale
Host is the gateway coordinator; runtime instability here cascades across all connector interactions.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Host binary starts, serves, and drains with no Tokio runtime dependencies.
- Graceful shutdown is deterministic under load/cancellation tests.
- Metrics/traces expose supervisor lifecycle and failure causes.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-28T00:44:19.134442Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-28T06:03:22.438222Z","closed_at":"2026-02-28T06:03:22.438205Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["asupersync","host","migration","phase-core"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.8","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.8","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.8","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.30","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.8","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.31","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.8","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.8","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":290,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.8","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"Implementation notes:
- Host migration should be staged by subsystem to keep bootability throughout transition.
- Capture lifecycle tracepoints for startup, admission, drain, and crash-recovery loops.
- Ensure service orchestration cannot outlive parent cancellation context.

Validation:
- Soak test host shutdown/restart cycles under synthetic connector load.","created_at":"2026-02-28T00:45:30Z"},{"id":291,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.8","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"Mandatory migration gate: (1) prove parity against flywheel_connectors-235t.30 contracts, (2) add/refresh comprehensive unit tests for happy/edge/error/cancellation cases, (3) add/refresh integration/e2e script coverage where applicable, and (4) ensure structured log schema from flywheel_connectors-235t.32 is emitted for all failure paths.","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:10:15Z"},{"id":292,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.8","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"Migration pass completed for host runtime dependency surface.

Implementation:
- Replaced remaining Tokio sync primitive imports in `crates/fcp-host/src/discovery.rs` and `crates/fcp-host/src/budget.rs` with `fcp_async_core::sync::{RwLock, Mutex}`.
- Removed direct Tokio runtime dependency from `crates/fcp-host/Cargo.toml` [dependencies].
- Replaced macro runtime entrypoint in `crates/fcp-host/src/bin/fcp-host.rs` with explicit sync `main` + `fcp_async_core::runtime::block_on_sync(async_main())` to avoid direct Tokio runtime linkage while preserving startup behavior.

Validation (all via `rch exec`, fail-open local due worker connectivity outage):
- `cargo check -p fcp-host --all-targets -j 1` PASS
- `cargo clippy -p fcp-host --lib --bin fcp-host -- -D warnings` PASS
- `cargo test -p fcp-host --lib -- --nocapture` PASS (52/52)
- `cargo fmt -p fcp-host --check` PASS

Known pre-existing/full-suite issue:
- `cargo test -p fcp-host -- --nocapture` fails in integration test `agent_integration` with JSONL schema assertion mismatch (`fcp-testkit/src/tracing_config.rs`), unrelated to Tokio dependency removal and outside this bead scope.

Post-migration audit:
- `rg` confirms no direct Tokio usage in host source/runtime paths; only dev-dependency Tokio remains for tests.
","created_at":"2026-02-28T06:03:19Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.9","title":"[ASUPERSYNC] Migrate fcp-streaming WebSocket/Reconnect/Backpressure Engine","description":"# Goal
Rebuild streaming transport loops on asupersync websocket/network primitives with explicit backpressure contracts.

## Scope
- WebSocket client/server loops, reconnect strategy, stream buffering, cancellation-safe drains.
- Replace tokio-tungstenite and Tokio-driven coordination where feasible.

## Rationale
Streaming paths are high-churn and failure-prone. This migration must preserve liveness while strengthening overload behavior.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Reconnect logic, buffer limits, and timeout behavior are deterministic in integration tests.
- No unbounded queue growth under burst scenarios.
- Streaming crate no longer uses Tokio runtime primitives.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CalmPond","created_at":"2026-02-28T00:44:19.236211Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-28T06:26:55.817171Z","closed_at":"2026-02-28T06:26:55.817158Z","close_reason":"Completed runtime migration for fcp-streaming: removed direct tokio runtime primitives and validated check/clippy/tests via rch","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["asupersync","migration","phase-core","streaming","websocket"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.9","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.9","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.9","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.30","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.9","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.31","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.9","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":293,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.9","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"Implementation notes:
- Move reconnect logic to explicit state machine with bounded retry/jitter policy.
- Separate ingress buffering from processing queues so overload behavior is visible and bounded.
- Tie stream task groups to parent operation context for clean teardown.

Validation:
- Backpressure stress tests must show no unbounded memory growth.","created_at":"2026-02-28T00:45:30Z"},{"id":294,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-235t.9","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"Mandatory migration gate: (1) prove parity against flywheel_connectors-235t.30 contracts, (2) add/refresh comprehensive unit tests for happy/edge/error/cancellation cases, (3) add/refresh integration/e2e script coverage where applicable, and (4) ensure structured log schema from flywheel_connectors-235t.32 is emitted for all failure paths.","created_at":"2026-02-28T01:10:15Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-23d7","title":"[IDEA-21.1] Implement zone policy diff + rollback CLI","description":"## What
Implement `fcp policy diff` and `fcp policy rollback --plan`.

## How
- Load two policy objects by ObjectId.
- Produce a structured diff (added/removed/changed fields).
- Emit rollback plan object (not executed automatically).

## Success Criteria
- CLI outputs both human and JSON diffs.

## Acceptance Criteria (Refined)
- CLI returns JSON diff with `added/removed/changed` sections.
- Rollback plan includes previous policy ObjectId.
","notes":"[AlienArtifactPractical]
- Add evidence ledger fields with per-check log-odds contributions and explicit loss decision.
- Add anytime-valid risk control (e-process) for approvals/denials and record epsilon in receipts.
[ExtremeOptimizationPractical]
- Compile policies to DAG/BDD and cache allow/deny results with LRU.
- Use bitset capability sets for fast subset checks.
[AlienArtifactReview] Updated 2026-02-02T23:58:59.240755+00:00","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T21:44:13.157411974Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T04:13:56.115163414Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T04:13:56.115066214Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-23d7","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-4zr0","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"flywheel_connectors-23v0o","title":"[AUDIT] fcp-conformance symlinked preopen escape is untested","description":"crates/fcp-conformance/tests/sandbox_isolation_conformance.rs:150-196 only proves lexical ../ traversal denial on a writable preopen and never asserts that create_store() rejects a readonly/writable path resolving through a symlinked ancestor. Repro: remove or relax fcp_sandbox::wasi::ensure_preopen_path_is_stable()/prepare_preopened_dir() symlink checks so a declared preopen like /tmp/root/link resolves outside the declared tree; current conformance still passes because it never mounts a symlinked preopen. Suggested fix: add conformance coverage that creates readonly and writable symlinked preopen paths and asserts WasiRuntime::create_store() fails closed with the symlinked-ancestor error.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-24T16:34:29.840965Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-04-24T16:34:29.840965Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

Total fcp-mesh: 433→550 tests. All clippy clean. Continuing expansion to remaining modules.","created_at":"2026-03-07T07:06:50Z"},{"id":937,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-23ve1","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"SunnyMoose: Committed 09a51c48 - +27 tests for symbol_request.rs (+15) and degraded.rs (+12). Total fcp-mesh: 550→577 tests. Session totals: +144 new tests across 5 modules (device, gossip, admission, symbol_request, degraded). All clippy clean.","created_at":"2026-03-07T07:12:07Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-24bc","title":"Policy Bundles: Signed ZonePolicy Packs + Diff/Preview/Rollback","description":"# Policy Bundles: Signed ZonePolicy Packs + Diff/Preview/Rollback

## Goal
Provide a safe, versioned workflow to propose, review, preview, apply, and roll back policy changes across zones.

## Why (User Impact)
- Prevents accidental policy regressions and privilege creep.
- Enables deterministic review with clear diffs and risk summaries.
- Makes policy changes auditable and reversible with one command.

## Scope
- PolicyBundle object (signed, versioned, immutable).
- Deterministic diff and risk summary engine.
- Preview evaluator (would-allow/deny deltas).
- CLI workflow for create/diff/preview/apply/rollback.

## Non-goals
- UI/editor; CLI only for now.

## Deliverables
- Canonical schema + signature rules for PolicyBundle.
- Diff + risk summary outputs with stable ordering.
- Preview evaluation reports with reason codes.
- CLI commands with JSON/human outputs.
- Unit/integration tests + E2E script with structured logs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Policy bundles are signed and verifiable; invalid signatures fail closed.
- Preview explains allow/deny deltas before apply.
- Rollback to previous bundle is one command and auditable.","notes":"Progress (WhiteDesert, 2026-02-02): Added fcp policy bundle diff CLI plumbing in crates/fcp-cli/src/policy/mod.rs. Command accepts --before/--after bundle JSON + --objects-before/--objects-after object maps (object_id -> policy object), resolves to PolicyBundleResolved, then uses fcp_core::diff_policy_bundles for deterministic diff + risk summary. Also fixed clippy doc issues in policy bundle schema test.

[AlienArtifactPractical]
- Add evidence ledger fields with per-check log-odds contributions and explicit loss decision.
- Add anytime-valid risk control (e-process) for approvals/denials and record epsilon in receipts.
[ExtremeOptimizationPractical]
- Compile policies to DAG/BDD and cache allow/deny results with LRU.
- Use bitset capability sets for fast subset checks.
[AlienArtifactReview] Updated 2026-02-02T23:58:59.240755+00:00","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:00:28.006280446Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-08T23:22:18.033830Z","closed_at":"2026-03-08T23:22:18.033816Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fcp2","policy","security"],"comments":[{"id":1084,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24bc","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"All 6 subtasks closed. Closing parent epic.","created_at":"2026-03-08T23:22:17Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-24dv","title":"[IDEA-28.2] Unit tests for budget enforcement","description":"## Coverage
- Budget exceeded → deny with reason code.
- Budget warning threshold logs warning.
- No budget → allow.

## Logging
- Structured logs include zone_id and budget state.
## Logging
- Emit structured JSONL per `docs/STANDARD_Testing_Logging.md` with `test_name`, `module`, `phase`, `correlation_id`, and `result`.
- Validate with `fcp_conformance::schemas::validate_e2e_log_jsonl` (use `fcp-testkit` LogCapture in unit tests).
","notes":"[AlienArtifactPractical]
- Add canonicalization proof tests: permute fields -> canonical bytes identical.
- Add deterministic vector generator with fixed seeds and algebraic edge cases.
[ExtremeOptimizationPractical]
- Batch ed25519 verification and reuse hashers where safe.
- Avoid allocations in canonicalization using stack buffers.
[AlienArtifactReview] Updated 2026-02-02T23:58:59.240755+00:00","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GreenCastle","created_at":"2026-01-27T21:49:00.432039469Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T18:51:43.562462242Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T18:51:43.562339433Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24dv","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-2kf9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-24dv","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-32sh","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:31:41Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
